skill_purpose: Review certification, patent, award, and laboratory evidence references for authenticity, scope, and readability.
summary: Detects certification and evidence claims in advertising; guides reviewers to verify document authenticity, applicable scope, and on-ad readability before publication.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Certification marks, patent numbers, awards, or laboratory test references in ad copy or imagery. ACTION: Confirm evidence document exists and covers the advertised product scope. CHECK: Mark legibility, expiry dates, and whether claim exceeds certificate scope. ESCALATE IF: Certification cannot be verified or appears misleading — route to Rule Corpus for binding decision.

detection_patterns.description: Certification, patent, award, or laboratory evidence requiring verification.

checkpoint_actions: Verify certification or test document authenticity
Confirm certificate scope covers advertised product and market
Check mark or badge is legible at published resolution
escalation_hints: Escalate when certification mark is expired or scope-limited
Escalate when patent or award claim cannot be substantiated
